steps.t: Dwarves can be found throughout Erebor. King Thorin has asked you to question the Dwarves of Erebor regarding rumours he has heard of a new expedition…
King Thorin III can be found before his throne in the Hall Under the Mountain. You have questioned many dwarves of Erebor concerning rumours of a forb…
Dori can be found somewhere outside Erebor. King Thorin III has asked you to speak to Dori and learn what he knows of the rumoured expedition to Thiki…
Nori can be found within the eastern keep outside Erebor. Dori has asked you to speak to Nori regarding unusual visitors to the coffers of Erebor.
Nori's missive is pinned to the door of one of the eastern keeps of Erebor. You have not found Nori, but you discovered a missive pinned to the door o…
